description_long: This is a modern, luxury house set within a fenced rectangular lot, surrounded by manicured lawns, trees, and shrubbery. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes with flat roofs, featuring skylights and rooftop elements. The front facade has a wide driveway leading to a double garage, flanked by symmetrical landscaping and decorative sculptures. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the exterior, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The backyard includes a swimming pool, patio area, and additional greenery, creating a private outdoor retreat. The house is finished in a combination of light and dark materials, emphasizing clean lines and geometric forms.
description: A modern, luxury house with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped grounds, featuring a driveway, double garage, and backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, driveway, symmetrical landscaping, and decorative sculptures.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private backyard, pool, patio, and the back facade with large windows and greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, additional trees, and the continuation of the modern architectural lines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wide, paved driveway leading to a double garage and main door, flanked by symmetrical landscaping and decorative sculptures, with no porch or overhang.
